_comment: Single source of truth for GAS deployment URL. Prefer clasp deploy -i deploymentId (URL stable). Run ./scripts/update-gas-url.sh only to re-propagate the SAME id; new ids require --i-know-this-changes-wix + human Wix Secrets update. Policy: shamrock-leads/docs/policies/gas-url-policy.md
note: Keep URLs stable. Active production IDs: deploymentId (leads) + school Netlify uses AKfycbyV48043q007TwWikAIFfyma5TNKjOF6nHDaza-hRMefEVmMM3xKamujQeKFBkZQa_DMg — both redeployed same code 2026-07-10. Wix must match whichever portal uses.
